prompt:
Goal: Create a bold minimalist food advertisement poster for a bakery opening, centered on one photorealistic Portuguese-style egg tart.

Canvas: Vertical poster in 3:4 aspect ratio, soft pale pink background with subtle smooth gradient, no borders or watermark.

Layout: At the very top, place an enormous uppercase red headline reading WE'RE, using a heavy geometric sans-serif font, spanning nearly the full width. Directly underneath, centered, add one rounded pill outline in red containing the uppercase text DELICIOUS EGG TARTS. In the middle of the poster, place exactly 1 large egg tart floating on the pink background, photographed realistically with no plate or hands. Below the tart, centered, add one smaller rounded red outline pill containing the uppercase text HAPPY HOUR: 6AM. At the bottom, place an enormous uppercase red word reading OPEN, using the same heavy sans-serif font, spanning almost the full width.

Subject details: The egg tart should be golden brown with a flaky layered puff-pastry crust, glossy yellow custard filling, dark caramelized blister spots, and a light dusting of powdered sugar across the top. Make it appetizing, sharply detailed, and studio-lit, with a subtle natural shadow only if needed.

Visual style: Modern pop-art bakery poster, high contrast red typography on pastel pink, clean negative space, centered alignment, crisp commercial food photography, bright but soft lighting.

Text constraints: Use exactly 4 visible text elements: 1 top headline, 1 product-label pill, 1 happy-hour pill, and 1 bottom headline. Keep all typography bright red, uppercase, bold, and clean. Do not add any extra logos, icons, prices, addresses, small print, or decorative objects.
